spec.query: SELECT mean("temperatura_interior") FROM "clima_local" WHERE isla =~ /^$isla$/ AND municipio =~ /^$municipio$/ AND centro =~ /^$centro$/ AND zona =~ /^$zona$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "centro", "zona", "id_dispositivo" fill(linear)

SELECT mean("temperatura_exterior") FROM "clima_local" WHERE isla =~ /^$isla$/ AND municipio =~ /^$municipio$/ AND centro =~ /^$centro$/ AND zona =~ /^$zona$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "centro", "zona", "id_dispositivo" fill(linear)

spec.title: Matriz de Confusión Binaria de Z-Score

spec.query: SELECT last("tp") AS "Éxitos", last("fp") AS "Falsas Alarmas", last("fn") AS "Fallos Omitidos", last("tn") AS "Negativos" FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /Z-Score/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"

spec.title: Matriz de Confusión Binaria de EWMA

spec.query: SELECT last("tp") AS "Éxitos", last("fp") AS "Falsas Alarmas", last("fn") AS "Fallos Omitidos", last("tn") AS "Negativos" FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /EWMA/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"

spec.title: Matriz de Confusión Binaria de Lógica Difusa

spec.query: SELECT last("tp") AS "Éxitos", last("fp") AS "Falsas Alarmas", last("fn") AS "Fallos Omitidos", last("tn") AS "Negativos" FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /Logica_Difusa_Fugas/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"
SELECT mean("latencia_media") AS "Latencia Media" FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /Z-Score/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"
SELECT mean("latencia_media") AS "Latencia Media" FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /EWMA/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"
SELECT mean("latencia_media") AS "Latencia Media" FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /Logica_Difusa/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"

SELECT mean("caudal_agua_Lmin") FROM "clima_local" WHERE "isla" =~ /^$isla$/ AND "municipio" =~ /^$municipio$/ AND "centro" =~ /^$centro$/ AND zona =~ /^$zona$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "centro", "zona", "id_dispositivo" fill(linear)

SELECT mean("consumo_electrico_W") FROM "clima_local" WHERE "isla" =~ /^$isla$/ AND "municipio" =~ /^$municipio$/ AND "centro" =~ /^$centro$/ AND zona =~ /^$zona$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "centro", "zona", "id_dispositivo" fill(linear)

spec.title: geografia
spec.description: ocalización perimetral de los gemelos digitales en tiempo real y criticidad de alertas utilizando Grafana Coordinate Lookup.

spec.query: SELECT last("latitude") AS "latitude", last("longitude") AS "longitude", last("caudal_agua_Lmin") AS "caudal", last("temperatura_interior") AS "temp_interior", last("temperatura_exterior") AS "temp_exterior" FROM "clima_local" WHERE $timeFilter AND "isla" =~ /^$isla$/ AND "municipio" =~ /^$municipio$/ AND "centro" =~ /^$centro$/ AND "zona" =~ /^$zona$/ GROUP BY "id_dispositivo", "municipio", "isla"
SELECT last("f1_score") AS "F1-Score", last("precision") AS "Precisión", last("recall") AS "Recall " FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /Z-Score/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"
SELECT last("f1_score") AS "F1-Score", last("precision") AS "Precisión", last("recall") AS "Recall " FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /EWMA/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"

SELECT last("f1_score") AS "F1-Score", last("precision") AS "Precisión", last("recall") AS "Recall " FROM "rendimiento_algoritmos" WHERE $timeFilter AND "algoritmo" =~ /Logica_Difusa_Fugas/ GROUP BY "algoritmo"

spec.name: municipio
spec.label: municipio:

spec.query: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "municipio" WHERE "isla" =~ /^$isla$/

spec.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "municipio" WHERE "isla" =~ /^$isla$/

spec.name: centro
spec.label: Centro:

spec.query: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "centro" WHERE "municipio" =~ /^$municipio$/

spec.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "centro" WHERE "municipio" =~ /^$municipio$/

spec.name: zona
spec.label: zona:

spec.query: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "zona" WHERE "centro" =~ /^$centro$/

spec.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "zona" WHERE "centro" =~ /^$centro$/
